name.jp: 断空コンビネーション

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

name.jp: インペリアルランパート

description.en: (Passive Effect) Removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color> from the caster at the start of the turn. Grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> to the ally with the lowest Health for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The Barrier strength increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)ターン開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。その後、残りHPが最も低い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。自分の<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>が高いほどシールド量がUPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 턴 시작 시 자신에게 걸려 있는 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color>개 제거합니다. 이후 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군에게 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다. 실드량은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>이 높을수록 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)在回合开始时,解除自身附带的<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。此后使生命值最低的友军获得<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。自身的<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color>越高,则护盾量越高。

name.jp: エンデュアランス・キャノン

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nIncreases the <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> and removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPさせ、攻撃対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다\n아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 증가시키고, 공격 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1</color>개 제거합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>,并解除攻击目标的<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
When hit by a Critical, decreases the <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of a random enemy by 50% for 1 turn. (Cannot be dispelled)

Each turn, Critical Chance increases for 1 turn, and when landing a Critical Hit, restores 10% of all allies' HP and Priority.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
会心を受けた時、1ターンの間、ランダムな敵1体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を50%減少。(解除不可)

毎ターン、会心率が1ターンの間上昇し、会心攻撃時、味方全体のHPと行動ゲージを10%回復。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
치명 피격 시 1턴 동안 무작위 적 1명의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 50% 감소시킵니다.(해제 불가) 

매 턴 치명 확률이 1턴 동안 증가하며, 치명 공격 시 아군 전체의 체력과 행동 게이지를 10% 회복합니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果)
受到致命打击时,使随机1名敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低50%,持续1回合。(不可解除)

每回合暴击率提升1回合,暴击时恢复我方全体10%生命值和行动值。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, your Priority increases by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>増加する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 종료 시 자신의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>증가합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,自身行动值+<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
